acceptedAnswer.text: Mikołaj Piech is a founder and developer from Poland who builds and ships consumer software on iOS, Android, and the web — from idea to launch, including design, development, and growth.

mainEntity.name: What apps has Mikołaj Piech built?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mikołaj Piech has built Trailo (AI travel planning), Subby (subscription manager), Doso (personal health app), and Solvee (AI homework helper, acquired after 25k+ downloads). All are consumer apps shipped to real users on the App Store, Google Play, or web.
Subby, a subscription manager app for iOS and Android, was created by Mikołaj Piech. It helps users track trials and subscriptions to avoid unwanted charges.
Solvee, an AI homework helper app for iOS and Android, was created by Mikołaj Piech. It reached 25k+ downloads before being acquired in February 2026.
Doso, a personal health app for iOS, was created by Mikołaj Piech. It helps users manage medications, lab results, and symptoms with AI-powered insights.
Trailo, an AI travel planning product for web and mobile, is being built by Mikołaj Piech. It covers flights, hotels, tickets, and hour-by-hour itineraries.

mainEntity.name: How can I contact Mikołaj Piech?

acceptedAnswer.text: Email hello@mikolajpiech.com, or find him on LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/mikolajpiech), X (@mikolajpiech), or GitHub (github.com/realmikolajpiech).
